AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description:
ProcrastiLearn manages a spaced-repetition vocabulary learning list.
Operational Patterns: - AI translation is applied automatically when an OpenAI API key is configured in the app settings and the AI translation toggle is enabled. - If AI is not configured, provide a manual translation via the optional 'translation' parameter. - If the word already exists in the list, adding it again will reset its learning progress and overwrite the translation.
Constraints: - AI translation availability depends on a valid OpenAI API key saved in app settings. - Word and translation values must not be blank.
